requirement_title: Login redirects to custom return URL
title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: The SPA navigates to the redirectUrl specified in the login route query string after successful login.
coverage_items: LoginPage--login[Successful login]/Navigate to redirectUrl from login route query string-->Redirected

requirement_title: Login redirects to custom return URL
title: EP Valid: Successful login with non-empty redirectUrl navigates to custom URL
precondition: User has valid credentials and a redirectUrl query parameter in the login route
test_steps:
Navigate to login page with redirectUrl=/dashboard in query string
Enter valid username and password
Submit login form
expected_result: After successful login, browser navigates to /dashboard

requirement_title: Login redirects to custom return URL
title: DT Rule 1: Successful login triggers redirect to valid redirectUrl
test_steps:
Navigate to login page with redirectUrl=/dashboard
Enter valid credentials
Submit
expected_result: User is authenticated and browser navigates to /dashboard
